title: Papertek Edu-Framework Exercise Schema
description: JSON Schema for exercises in the Papertek Edu-Framework. Defines the structure for all exercise types used in language learning applications.

lesson.title: Lesson Container
lesson.description: Container for a single lesson with regular exercises and optional extra exercises.

exercises.description: Array of regular exercises for this lesson.

extraExercises.description: Array of extra/advanced exercises for this lesson. Optional.

jeopardy.description: Optional Jeopardy game configuration for classroom games.

tierRennen.description: Optional Tier-Rennen (animal race) game configuration for classroom games.

exercise.title: Exercise Base
exercise.description: Base structure for all exercise types. Each exercise must have common properties and type-specific properties.

id.description: Unique identifier for this exercise within its lesson. Examples: 'aufgabeA', 'ekstraovelse-1-3-1'. Must be unique and follow naming conventions.

type.description: The exercise type. Determines which type-specific properties are required.

title.description: Display title for the exercise. May contain HTML markup.

description.description: Instructions or descriptive text for the exercise. May contain HTML markup.

badges.description: Visual badges for the exercise (e.g., difficulty, lesson reference, exercise type).

printInstructions.description: Alternative instructions specifically for print output. May contain HTML markup.

badge.title: Exercise Badge
badge.description: Visual badge displayed with an exercise. Used for categorization and metadata.

text.description: Display text for the badge. May include emoji. Example: '🔄 Repetisjon' or 'Leksjon 3.2'.

color.description: Tailwind color class for the badge. Examples: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800', 'bg-green-100 text-green-800'.

fillInExercise.title: Fill-in Exercise Type
fillInExercise.description: Fill-in-the-blank exercise. Students complete sentences with missing words. Supports grouped items (for separable verbs and multi-part answers) and verb-based sections.

items.description: Array of fill-in items. Items with empty 'pre' field are grouped on the same line as the previous item. May be empty when 'sections' is used instead.

sections.description: Array of grouped sections, each with a heading and verb information. Either sections OR items must be present, not both.

fillInItem.title: Fill-in Item
fillInItem.description: Single fill-in blank with pre-text, answer(s), and post-text. Supports multiple formats: standard (answer+post), grammar (answer+postGrammar), and flexible (answerFlexible+placeholder).

pre.description: Text before the blank. Empty string groups this item on the same line as the previous item.

answer.description: Correct answer(s). Comma-separated alternatives are accepted.

answerFlexible.description: Flexible answer format for open-ended responses. Comma-separated accepted keywords.

oneOf.description: Text after the blank with optional grammar annotation.

postGrammar.description: Grammar-annotated word displayed after the blank (alternative to 'post').

width.description: Tailwind CSS width class for the input field. Examples: 'w-20', 'w-24', 'w-28', 'w-32', 'w-full'.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown in the input field.

section.description: Optional section heading for grouping items (e.g., 'Part 1: mein and meine').

postWithGrammarInfo.title: Post-text with Grammar Info
postWithGrammarInfo.description: Post-text after a blank with optional grammar information.

type.description: Grammar type for styling/classification. Accepts both Norwegian (substantiv, verb) and English (noun, verb) names.

fillInSection.title: Fill-in Section
fillInSection.description: A grouped section of fill-in items with a heading and verb information.

verb.description: Information about the verb being practiced in this section.

german.description: German infinitive or base form of the verb.

translation.description: Translation in the UI language (language-agnostic alternative to norwegian/english).

verbAttr.description: Optional additional verb attributes or metadata.

items.description: Fill-in items for this section, same format as top-level items.

matchingExercise.title: Matching Exercise Type
matchingExercise.description: Pair matching game. Students click items from the left to match with items on the right. At least one of 'pairs' or 'variableName' must be provided.

pairs.description: Array of question-answer pairs to match. Optional if using variableName for lazy loading.

variableName.description: Global window variable name containing the pairs data (used for lazy loading/external data). Optional if using pairs array.

isIconGame.description: Whether this matching game uses icons/images instead of text. Defaults to false.

matchingPair.title: Matching Pair
matchingPair.description: Single pair for a matching exercise. Supports two formats: { id, q, a } or { left, right }.

id.description: Unique identifier for this pair within the exercise (integer or string).

q.description: Question/left-side item text. May contain HTML.

a.description: Answer/right-side item text. May contain HTML.

group.description: Optional grouping category. Used to group related pairs visually.

trueFalseExercise.title: True-False Exercise Type
trueFalseExercise.description: True/false statement exercise. Students evaluate whether statements are correct or incorrect. At least one of 'statements' or 'variableName' must be provided.

statements.description: Array of true/false statements. Optional if using variableName for lazy loading.

variableName.description: Global window variable name containing the statements data (used for lazy loading). Optional if using statements array.

q.description: The statement text. May contain HTML.

a.description: Whether the statement is true (true) or false (false).

tysk.description: Optional German original text for reference/comparison.

img.description: Optional image URL for visual reference.

trueFalsePicturesExercise.title: True-False with Pictures Exercise Type
trueFalsePicturesExercise.description: True/false exercise with accompanying images. At least one of 'statements' or 'variableName' must be provided.

statements.description: Array of true/false statements with images. Optional if using variableName for lazy loading.

variableName.description: Global window variable name containing the statements data (used for lazy loading). Optional if using statements array.

trueFalsePictureStatement.title: True-False Picture Statement
trueFalsePictureStatement.description: True/false statement with an associated image.

q.description: The statement text. May contain HTML.

a.description: Whether the statement is true (true) or false (false).

img.description: URL or path to the image file.

tysk.description: Optional German original text for reference/comparison.

quizExercise.title: Quiz Exercise Type
quizExercise.description: Multiple choice quiz. Supports both simple and structured question formats. At least one of 'questions' or 'variableName' must be provided.

questions.description: Array of quiz questions. Supports two formats: simple { q, a } or structured { question, options, correctIndex }. Optional if using variableName for lazy loading.

variableName.description: Global window variable name containing the questions data (used for lazy loading). Optional if using questions array.

quizQuestionSimple.title: Quiz Question (Simple Format)
quizQuestionSimple.description: Simple quiz question with question and single answer.

quizQuestionStructured.title: Quiz Question (Structured Format)
quizQuestionStructured.description: Structured quiz question with multiple choice options.

correctIndex.description: Zero-based index of the correct answer in the options array.

quizQuestionWithOptions.title: Quiz Question (Options with Correct Value)
quizQuestionWithOptions.description: Quiz question with options where the correct answer is specified by value (not index). Supports optional explanation.

correct.description: The correct answer value (must match one of the options).

writingExercise.title: Writing Exercise Type
writingExercise.description: Free-text writing task. Students compose a response in a textarea with optional template guidance.

template.description: Optional template lines to guide students. Lines with [brackets] are placeholders the student should replace.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown in the textarea when empty.

dragDropExercise.title: Drag-Drop Exercise Type
dragDropExercise.description: Word ordering exercise. Students click words from a word bank to build sentences in the correct order.

sentences.description: Array of sentence tasks to complete.

dragDropSentence.title: Drag-Drop Sentence
dragDropSentence.description: Single sentence task for drag-drop exercise. Words can be in 'words' or 'ord' property.

q.description: Norwegian translation or context for the sentence (shown as guidance).

words.description: Array of words (in correct order) that the student must arrange.

ord.description: Array of words in correct order (Norwegian field name, alias for 'words').

svar.description: Optional: the complete correct sentence as a reference.

punctuation.description: Punctuation mark(s) to append at the end. Example: '.', '?', '!'. Optional when punctuation is included in words.

minidialogExercise.title: Minidialog Exercise Type
minidialogExercise.description: Role-play scenario with multiple dialog sequences. Students select scenarios and step through dialog lines.

scenarios.description: Object where keys are scenario identifiers and values are scenario definitions.

minidialogScenario.title: Minidialog Scenario
minidialogScenario.description: Single dialog scenario within a minidialog exercise.

description.description: Description or context for the scenario.

dialog.description: Array of dialog lines in conversation sequence.

minidialogLine.title: Minidialog Line
minidialogLine.description: Single line in a minidialog conversation.

speaker.description: Name or identifier of the speaker (e.g., 'Person A', 'Shop Assistant', 'Customer').

text.description: The spoken text. May contain HTML markup.

dilemmaExercise.title: Dilemma Exercise Type
dilemmaExercise.description: Dropdown selection exercise. Students select the correct option from a dropdown for each sentence item.

items.description: Array of sentence items with dropdown selections.

dilemmaItem.title: Dilemma Item
dilemmaItem.description: Single dropdown selection item within a dilemma exercise.

correct.description: The correct answer (must match one of the options exactly).

imageMatchingExercise.title: Image Matching Exercise Type
imageMatchingExercise.description: Match images with text answers. Images displayed on the left, text answers on the right. At least one of 'pairs' or 'variableName' must be provided.

pairs.description: Array of image-answer pairs to match. Optional if using variableName for lazy loading.

variableName.description: Global window variable name containing the pairs data (used for lazy loading). Optional if using pairs array.

imageMatchingPair.title: Image Matching Pair
imageMatchingPair.description: Single image-answer pair for image matching exercise.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for this pair within the exercise.

image.description: URL or path to the image file.

answer.description: The text answer to match with the image.

group.description: Optional grouping category. Used to group related pairs.

chronologyExercise.title: Chronology Exercise Type
chronologyExercise.description: Timeline/sequence ordering exercise. Students arrange items (text, images, or dialog lines) in the correct chronological order.

items.description: Array of items to arrange in order. Can be strings (text lines) or more complex objects.

checklistExercise.title: Checklist Exercise Type
checklistExercise.description: Self-assessment checklist exercise. Students check off items to self-evaluate their understanding or progress.

interactiveFlashcardsExercise.title: Interactive Flashcards Exercise Type
interactiveFlashcardsExercise.description: Flip card exercise. Students flip cards to reveal translations or definitions.

flashcard.title: Flashcard Pair
flashcard.description: Single flashcard with front and back content.

front.description: Front side of the card (initially shown).

back.description: Back side of the card (shown when flipped).

interactiveMapExercise.title: Interactive Map Exercise Type
interactiveMapExercise.description: Clickable geography/map exercise. Students click on map regions or elements to identify them.

mapUrl.description: URL or path to the map image or embedded map resource.

hotspots.description: Array of clickable regions/hotspots on the map.

hotspot.title: Map Hotspot
hotspot.description: Clickable region on an interactive map.

label.description: Label or name of the region/location.

numberGridsExercise.title: Number Grids Exercise Type
numberGridsExercise.description: Number practice grid exercise. Students work with number patterns or calculations in a grid format.

colorPickerExercise.title: Color Picker Exercise Type
colorPickerExercise.description: Color selection exercise. Students select or match colors based on descriptions or visual samples.

label.description: Text label or description (e.g., German color name).

correctColor.description: Correct color value (hex, rgb, or color name).

options.description: Array of color options to choose from.

embeddedVerbTrainerExercise.title: Embedded Verb Trainer Exercise Type
embeddedVerbTrainerExercise.description: Embedded verb conjugation trainer widget. Dedicated verb conjugation drill interface.

verbs.description: Array of verbs to practice. Optional if using external data source.

dataSource.description: Optional external data source for verb data (e.g., API endpoint or variable name).

modes.description: Array of practice modes to include. Example: ['all-tenses', 'regular-only', 'separable-only'].

config.description: Configuration object for the verb trainer.

chapters.description: Array of chapter numbers to include.

modalOnly.description: Whether to only practice modal verbs.

questionCount.description: Number of questions to ask in a session.

embeddedGenderTrainerExercise.title: Embedded Gender Trainer Exercise Type
embeddedGenderTrainerExercise.description: Embedded noun gender trainer widget. Dedicated noun gender (der/die/das) practice interface.

nouns.description: Array of nouns to practice. Optional if using external data source.

dataSource.description: Optional external data source for noun data (e.g., API endpoint or variable name).

config.description: Configuration object for the gender trainer.

chapters.description: Array of chapter numbers to include.

questionCount.description: Number of questions to ask in a session.

noun.description: The German noun (with or without article).
